transcript.text:
Is it Thuyang? Thuyang?
We need to prepare some garlic
*Sinan County, South Jeolla Province, South Korea
I already told you this
*Life...
Don't cry. I'll give you some webfoot octopus
*A meal that made Tzuyang laugh
Hello everyone~
I am here at Sinan today
They are known for their garlic
I heard that the garlic market was not doing well despite their garlic harvest
So I am here to lend a little help
They are also famous for their webfoot octopus
I will be trying that today
*Off to Banwol Island
*Purple Island

This village is all purple
I only made this much
Thank you
This is really good
Thank you
They said you like octopus intestines
Thank you
Eat a lot and promote our garlic
They prepared all these webfoot octopus dishes for me
Live octopus, Webfoot octopus skewers,
Abalone, and intestines because I said I like them
And also all the garlic side dishes
Bon Appetit!
It's my first time trying the skewers
It's rolled up on the chopstick
Where do I dip this? I guess the Ssamjang (seasoned soybean paste)

Do I need to eat this in 1 bite?
Yummy
The octopus is so tender even after it's gone cold
Let's try the live octopus now
This has to taste good
How do I eat this..?
I'm scared.. This is scary
I'm not good at eating live octopus
The octopus tastes great
Put it on top,
Stir-fried garlic
2 of them or just 1?
That's good
It's nicely stir-fried
Tasty I'll put 1 more
Garlic is really good for your health

The main reason why I'm here today
Is to promote garlic
Their farm and harvest went really well but
Garlic consumption has been going down overall
It might be because of COVID19
But also been it's been substituted with Kimchi
So it hasn't been selling as much
Garlic is good for your health
Good for recovery, blood flow
Even for your skin
So I hope you guys can look into their garlic as well
Intestines
Garlic Rice~
Garlic rice..
It has the aroma of garlic
It's just a tasty bowl of rice

Abalone
It's so big
Is it because we are at an island?
Look at the thickness
That's amazing
Delicious
Live octopus
On lettuce
Ew~
I'll try it with the marinated garlic this time
This place is called Banwol island
You take the boat/ship for about an hour from Mokpo
The whole village is purple
Even the bridges
Their roof
That's why I'm wearing a purple shirt

*Purple Island
Garlic helps you digest better as well
I can digest well anyway
Take it out like this
Dip it in ssamjang
I'll eat some intestines first
Lettuce, perilla leaf,
Webfoot octopus,
Garlic,
This is huge
That's so cute!
*I better go say hello
*Run
*Real dog hole
*Tzuyang's current profile picture
They say you're famous

For eating so much
This is so much food How many serving is that?
Count that up
Ramyun noodles for dessert
How many is this?
This is 2
I was going to make 3
She's eating ramyun after that big meal?
That's her job
*The outside world is so cool
I can put some of this in the noodles, right?
It will taste even better
I'll put some in
I'll get cooked a little
How is it?
I love it

Is it good or not?
This is Shin Ramyun, right?
Yes, you're right. It's Shin Ramyun (Brand)
Ramyun always goes so well with seafood
It's amazing
I'll take one of the skewers
Webfoot octopus
Eat it together
I'm finished
I came to Shinan to eat their abalone, webfoot octopus, and garlic
It was very delicious
I will now go work since they fed me
Thanks everyone~
We need to cut up some garlic
I'm sure many restaurants use garlic as their ingredients
And those restaurants were not able to open for business due to COVID19

I hope that garlic consumption will get better after Tzuyang goes on Youtube
So that us country people can make a living
Tzuyang came to cooperate with us
I'm grateful!
*Garlic farming went well but the consumption rate went down so their prices went down
*Out of 3000 garlic productions, 1000 have been thrown away
The only reason why our garlic is so great is because of the atmosphere and the environment
The inside is filled and they are big
It's great
Turn the camera
You already know
How do you work as a cameraman if you don't know that
It's so delicious!
Turn it
Imagine eating this with pork belly
*Sharing is caring

*Garlic attack
*Turn it
We can grind it, chew it,
*No exceptions
Turn it
Sit down
Sit here
Put it up here
Is it Thuyang? Thuyang?
Is she Chinese?
Tzyang! Let's eat some watermelon
Tzyang!
Is she on Nutube?
Are you on Nutube?
Yes I am on Youtube
I will watch you on Nutube

How long do I need to wait to watch you?
Edit all of this out
I came to Sinan to help harvest the garlic
I only did a little bit but I'm already worn out
They are doing this everyday
Everyone is struggling due to COVID19
So help out by eating lots of garlic
I hope it helps our garlic farms and farmers
Bye Tzuyang!
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
